title: Aterian Reports Q4 and Full Year 2024 Results - Profitability Progress
text: Aterian completed 2024 with improved operational metrics following a year of significant transformation. Q4 2024 net revenue was in line with expectations as the company executed its strategic initiatives to drive profitability. Full year 2024 revenue declined to $99.0 million, a 30.5% decrease from $142.6 million in 2023, primarily due to SKU rationalization efforts that the company undertook to improve margins. Gross margin expanded to 62.1% in 2024 from 49.3% in 2023, representing a significant 880 basis point improvement. This margin expansion was driven by eliminating low-margin SKUs, improving product mix, and better procurement efficiencies. Operating loss for 2024 was $11.8 million compared to $76.2 million in 2023, representing a 84.5% improvement. The company generated positive operating cash flow of $2.2 million in 2024. Net loss improved substantially, with adjusted EBITDA losses narrowing significantly. Looking to 2025, management projects revenue growth of 5-7% to $104-106 million with expectations of reaching break-even adjusted EBITDA. The company has consolidated to six core brands and is positioned to transition from restructuring to growth phase.
